results.title: Auto sales picked up in May on steadier fuel prices
results.description: MANILA, Philippines – Philippine vehicle sales accelerated to 33,532 units in May, recovering from April’s deceleration but remaining well below last year’s pace as Filipinos continued to prioritize fuel efficiency. Sales rose 23.8 percent from 27,089 units in April but were still 15.7 percent lower than the 39,775 units sold in May 2025. READ: PH car sales drop 19% in April as Mideast crisis tempers demand Still, the Chamber of Automotive Manufacturers of the Philippines Inc. (Campi) said the stronger monthly performance had brightened the industry’s outlook after concerns over war-driven oil price volatility dampened sentiment in recent months. “The [...]... Keep on reading: Auto sales picked up in May on steadier fuel prices

results.title: Striding AI Launches with Plans to Build Next-Generation Robotic Foundation Systems for Physical AI Deployment
results.description: Striding AI announced that it is developing a new generation of robotic foundation systems designed to accelerate the deployment of Physical AI in real-world environments. The company’s approach focuses on building the foundational technologies required for robots to perceive, reason, act, and continuously improve through interaction with the physical world. By integrating advanced foundation models [...] The post Striding AI Launches with Plans to Build Next-Generation Robotic Foundation Systems for Physical AI Deployment appeared first on AiThority .

results.title: US restrictions of advanced AI systems a "knee-jerk reaction.” says Jay Chaudhry, founder, Zscaler
results.description: Indian-origin Jay Chaudhry, founder, chairman and CEO of San Jose, California-headquartered company Zscaler said that concerns around restricted access to advanced AI models by Anthropic are overblown. In an interview with ET's Technology Editor, Surabhi Agarwal, he also criticised recent US restrictions around advanced AI systems calling it a 'knee-jerk reaction.” The company has a market capitalisation of roughly $20 billion and Zscaler was among the select 40 companies that received early access to Anthropic’s advanced AI model, Mythos, under Project Glasswing.

results.description: As a major financial and economic hub, Singapore has attracted a large number of enterprises and institutions to accelerate their presence in recent years.
